context.role: uncomfortable state when cage has 3+ poop items, prompts player to clean
context.usage_scenario: displayed when cage is dirty, resolved by player cleaning action, shows Echo's discomfort

visual_specification.shape: cockatiel with slightly ruffled feathers, uncomfortable posture
visual_specification.texture: pixel art with minimal dithering, hand-drawn organic feel
visual_specification.outline: 1px dark outline (#1D2B53) on key features only

animation.description: F1: normal stance with slight discomfort, F2: head shake, F3: feathers ruffle

visual_specification.details: crest slightly askew, eyes show mild discomfort (half-closed or squinting), occasional head shake, dust particles (#C2C3C7) around body, feathers appear slightly disheveled

relationships.shared_with: all Echo states share same base body structure and color palette
relationships.differences_from: unique uncomfortable expression, dust particle effects, triggered by environmental condition (dirty cage), resolved by cleaning action

explicit_negations: no motion blur or tweening between frames
no visible dirt on Echo's body (dust particles only)
